sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Capstone Therapeutics Corp. Announces Name Change to Capstone Holding Corp.
feed.summary: Capstone Therapeutics Corp. announced its name change to Capstone Holding Corp., effective February 25, 2022. This change reflects the company's shift away from pharmaceutical development after licensing its assets in December 2021. Capstone Holding Corp. now focuses on its majority ownership in building materials company TotalStone, LLC and a minority stake in consumer wellness company Diamond Products, LLC, with the goal of creating shareholder value through these new ventures.

feed.title: AWM Capital LLC Has $57.04 Million Holdings in Dimensional Emerging Markets Core Equity 2 ETF $DFEM
feed.summary: AWM Capital LLC increased its stake in the Dimensional Emerging Markets Core Equity 2 ETF (DFEM) by 3.2% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 1,778,492 shares valued at $57.04 million. This investment now represents 5.2% of AWM Capital's portfolio and makes DFEM its 6th largest position. Other institutional investors like Comerica Bank, Pinnacle Bancorp Inc., and First United Bank & Trust also adjusted their holdings in the ETF.

feed.title: BWX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:BWXT) Sees Significant Growth in Short Interest
feed.summary: BWX Technologies (NYSE:BWXT) experienced a significant 19.6% increase in short interest during December, reaching 2,747,394 shares, which represents about 3.0% of its shares sold short. This surge in short interest comes after the company reported strong Q4 results, surpassing analyst estimates with $1.00 EPS and $866.3 million in revenue, and issued optimistic FY2025 guidance. The stock has seen price appreciation, trading near its one-year high, while also recently announcing a quarterly dividend and receiving mixed analyst ratings with an average "Moderate Buy."

feed.title: New Oriental Education & Technology Group, Inc. (NYSE:EDU) Short Interest Up 20.9% in December
feed.summary: Short interest in New Oriental Education & Technology Group (NYSE:EDU) increased by 20.9% in December, reaching 5,456,992 shares, which represents 4.1% of the company's shares outstanding. The stock recently traded down and has a market capitalization of $8.72 billion. Analysts currently have a "Hold" consensus rating with an average target price of $59.53, despite some firms raising their price objectives.

feed.title: Coeur Mining, Inc. (NYSE:CDE) Sees Large Growth in Short Interest
feed.summary: Short interest in Coeur Mining (NYSE:CDE) increased significantly by 20.5% in December, reaching 66.58 million shares, which represents about 10.5% of its shares and a 3.4-day short-interest ratio. Despite this rise in short interest, analyst sentiment remains largely positive, with a consensus "Buy" rating and an average price target of $16.75. Institutional ownership is high at 63.01%, with major firms like Goldman Sachs and UBS Asset Management increasing their stakes, indicating strong investor confidence.

feed.title: Boulder businesses lose tens of thousands after planned Xcel outages
feed.summary: Boulder businesses report losing tens of thousands of dollars due to planned power outages by Xcel Energy in December, initiated as a public safety measure against wildfire risk. A survey by the Boulder Chamber of Commerce indicates an average loss of over $25,000 per business and significant wage losses for employees. Xcel Energy has stated it will not reimburse customers for these losses, consistent with its policy for storm-related and public safety power shutoffs.

feed.title: ARDT LEGAL REMINDER: Lose Money on Ardent Health, Inc.? BFA Law Reminds Investors of its Pending Securities Fraud Class Action and to Contact the Firm by March 9 Deadline
feed.summary: Bleichmar Fonti & Auld LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Ardent Health, Inc. (NYSE:ARDT) and its executives for securities fraud. The lawsuit alleges that Ardent Health misrepresented its accounts receivable collection practices, leading to a significant stock price drop in November 2025. Investors who lost money are encouraged to contact BFA Law by March 9, 2026, to discuss their options.

feed.title: Why Is First Horizon Corporation (FHN) Stock Down Today?
feed.summary: First Horizon Corporation (FHN) stock is down 1.31% today at $24.12, with higher-than-average trading volume suggesting selling interest. Despite the dip, the stock is trading above its 50-day and 200-day moving averages, indicating underlying strength. Analyst sentiment remains bullish, and forecast models predict significant returns over one, three, and five years.

feed.title: News Corp Updates US$2 Billion Share Repurchase Authorisations, Excludes ASX CDIs
feed.summary: News Corporation has announced updates to its share repurchase programs, authorizing up to US$2 billion for buying back Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common stock. The company explicitly states that these repurchases will exclude ASX-listed CDIs. News Corporation is a global media and information services company with shares trading on Nasdaq and as CDIs on the ASX.

feed.title: Charles Schwab (SCHW) Q4 Earnings: What To Expect
feed.summary: Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) is set to report its Q4 earnings before market open this Wednesday. Analysts anticipate a 19.4% year-on-year revenue growth to $6.36 billion and adjusted earnings of $1.39 per share, with estimates largely reconfirmed over the past month. The company has a history of beating revenue estimates, and peer results from Jefferies and Goldman Sachs offer some indication of market trends.

feed.title: Short Interest in Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) Rises By 21.9%
feed.summary: Short interest in Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) increased by 21.9% in December, reaching over 5 million shares, which represents 2.2% of the company's outstanding stock. The company also recently raised its quarterly dividend to $0.56 per share, indicating a 1.3% yield. Despite this, corporate insiders have been net sellers, while institutional investors hold a significant majority of the stock.

feed.title: The Truth About Alphabet Inc. (Class C): Is This Viral Tech Giant Still Worth Your Money?
feed.summary: This article analyzes whether Alphabet Inc. (Class C) (GOOG) remains a valuable investment given its dominant position in search, YouTube, and AI advancements. It evaluates the company's "clout," financial performance, AI integration, and core ad business, comparing it against competitors like Microsoft. The author concludes that Alphabet is a "cop" (worth buying) for long-term investors seeking a stable tech giant with real earnings, despite potential risks from regulation and competition.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Group (CFG) To Report Earnings Tomorrow: Here Is What To Expect
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group (CFG) is scheduled to report earnings this Wednesday morning. Analysts expect the company's revenue to grow 8.4% year-on-year to $2.14 billion and adjusted earnings to reach $1.11 per share. The stock has seen a 1.9% increase over the last month, aligning with a general upward trend in the regional banks segment ahead of earnings.

feed.title: Truist Financial (TFC) To Report Earnings Tomorrow: Here Is What To Expect
feed.summary: Truist Financial (TFC) is set to report its earnings tomorrow before the market opens. Analysts expect the company's revenue to grow 4% year-on-year to $5.32 billion, with adjusted earnings projected to be $1.09 per share. The stock has remained unchanged in the last month, heading into earnings with an average analyst price target of $55.11 compared to its current price of $50.06.

feed.title: Citi Downgrades European Stocks on US Friction Over Greenland
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc. has downgraded European equities for the first time in over a year. The downgrade is attributed to worsening relations between Brussels and Washington, stemming from President Donald Trump's push to acquire Greenland. Strategists at Citi believe that increased transatlantic tensions and tariff uncertainties will negatively impact the investment outlook for European equities and hurt corporate earnings on the continent.

feed.title: PNB MetLife launches dividend fund linked to insurance
feed.summary: PNB MetLife India Insurance Company Limited has introduced the PNB MetLife Dividend Leaders Index Fund, an equity fund integrated into its unit-linked insurance plans (ULIPs). This passive fund, offered in partnership with Policybazaar, tracks the BSE 500 Dividend Leaders 50 Index. It invests in approximately 50 top dividend-paying companies across various sectors, focusing on consistent dividend history.

feed.title: Conagra Brands: A Fallen High-Yield Food Giant With Multiple Paths To Recovery (NYSE:CAG)
feed.summary: Conagra Brands (CAG) is reiterated as a Buy due to its attractive ~8.25% sustainable dividend yield and a deeply discounted valuation. The company's robust free cash flow supports its dividend and offers potential for buybacks, despite flat organic sales guidance for FY26. While risks such as macro headwinds and private-label competition exist, strong cash flow and buyout potential provide downside protection.

feed.title: CNH Industrial N.V. (NYSE:CNH) Sees Large Growth in Short Interest
feed.summary: CNH Industrial N.V. (NYSE:CNH) experienced a significant increase in short interest, with shares sold short rising by 21.8% to 51.44 million as of December 31st. This represents about 4.1% of the stock and a short-interest ratio of 5.8 days. Despite this, insiders have recently purchased shares, and the company maintains a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $12.97.

feed.title: Is Centuri Holdings (CTRI) Among the Best Performing Utility Stocks in 2025?
feed.summary: Centuri Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CTRI) is highlighted as one of the best-performing utility stocks in 2025, operating as a strategic infrastructure services company for utilities in the US and Canada. The company recently secured $870 million in new bookings, with a significant portion being renewals, indicating strong customer demand and reflecting positive business fundamentals. An analyst at Wells Fargo raised the price target for CTRI to $30, maintaining an 'Overweight' rating due to the company's strong performance and growth prospects.

feed.title: Bally's Corporation (NYSE:BALY) Short Interest Up 21.1% in December
feed.summary: Bally's Corporation (NYSE:BALY) saw a significant increase in short interest during December, with the total rising by 21.1% to 632,605 shares. This indicates increased bearish sentiment, as the short interest now represents 5.1% of the company's float with a days-to-cover ratio of 5.3 days. Analyst ratings are generally cautious, with a consensus "Reduce" rating and an average target price of $16.50, reflecting concerns about the company's current loss-making status and high leverage.

feed.title: How Clearfield’s new platform strives to simplify fiber management
feed.summary: Clearfield has launched the NOVA Platform, a modular, high-density fiber ecosystem designed to simplify building and scaling modern networks across various environments, from hyperscale data centers to enterprise campuses. The platform addresses the increasing demand for high-density fiber solutions driven by AI-driven designs and features innovations like the NOVA Cassette and NOVA Patch Panels for easier installation and management. This aims to help operators streamline deployments, reduce inventory, and expand networks efficiently without extensive retraining or integrating multiple vendors.

feed.title: Emera Incorporated (EMA) Declares Quarterly Dividend of C$0.7325 per Share
feed.summary: Emera Incorporated (EMA) has declared a quarterly dividend of C$0.7325 per share, payable on February 13, 2026, to shareholders as of January 30, with an annual dividend yield of 4.28%. Despite a recently unveiled $20 billion capital plan and reaffirmed earnings guidance, BofA downgraded the stock from 'Buy' to 'Neutral' due to valuation concerns and risks in Nova Scotia. The article also mentions EMA's inclusion among the 10 Best Performing Utility Stocks in 2025.

feed.title: Assessing Banco Latinoamericano de Comercio Exterior S. A (NYSE:BLX) Valuation After Strong Multi‑Year Shareholder Returns
feed.summary: Banco Latinoamericano de Comercio Exterior S. A (NYSE:BLX) is drawing investor attention due to its strong long-term share performance, with 1-year, 3-year, and 5-year returns of 24.40%, 206.73%, and 261.54% respectively. Despite softer recent momentum, models suggest the stock, currently priced at $43.08, is undervalued against a fair value of $55.50. This valuation is supported by modest growth, strong margins, and the potential impact of a new digital trade finance platform.

feed.title: Why Should You Consider Adding BEEM Stock to Your Portfolio Now?
feed.summary: Beam Global (BEEM) is a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) stock that provides sustainable infrastructure solutions for transportation electrification and smart cities. The company reported a strong preliminary fourth quarter 2025 revenue increase of over 50% sequentially, driven by new products, international expansion, and diversified customer sales. Beam Global is expanding its global footprint, particularly in Europe and the Middle East, and securing new patents for its proprietary technology, making it an attractive addition to an investment portfolio.

feed.title: Apple agrees to pay $150,000 fine, amend business practices
feed.summary: Apple Inc. has agreed to pay a $150,000 fine and amend its business practices in New Jersey after state Attorney General Matthew Platkin announced widespread merchandise pricing violations in Apple stores. The allegations stem from a reinspection that revealed Apple failed to provide continuously available pricing information and conspicuously post refund policies, violating a previous consent order from 2017. The new consent order mandates specific changes to how Apple displays pricing and refund policies.

feed.title: Goldman Says Higher Offer for Toyota Industries Supports Market
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs believes that the increased tender offer price for Toyota Industries Corp. will enhance foreign investor confidence in Japanese equities. This move signals better protection for minority shareholders, a factor Goldman Sachs' Chief Japan Equity Strategist, Bruce Kirk, called "remarkable" and likely to encourage further foreign participation in the market.

feed.title: Autohome Inc. (NYSE:ATHM) Sees Large Growth in Short Interest
feed.summary: Autohome Inc. (NYSE:ATHM) experienced a significant 21.9% increase in short interest as of December 31st, reaching 2,249,740 shares, representing 2.0% of its outstanding shares and a 4.6 days-to-cover ratio. The company recently declared a special dividend of $1.20, resulting in a high payout ratio of 102.94%. Analysts currently have a consensus "Hold" rating for ATHM with an average price target of $28.00, following a downgrade from JPMorgan.

feed.title: Short Interest in Associated Banc-Corp (NYSE:ASB) Grows By 20.6%
feed.summary: Short interest in Associated Banc-Corp (NYSE:ASB) increased by 20.6% in December, reaching 4,883,428 shares, indicating increased bearish sentiment. Analysts have a mixed view with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target price of $28.50, while the stock currently trades around $26.58. Despite a payout ratio exceeding 100%, the bank recently raised its quarterly dividend, and insiders have sold shares totaling approximately $925,756 in the last 90 days.

feed.title: Bunge Global SA (NYSE:BG) Short Interest Up 20.3% in December
feed.summary: Bunge Global SA (NYSE:BG) experienced a significant 20.3% increase in short interest in December, reaching 6,408,879 shares, indicating growing bearish sentiment. Despite this, the stock trades near its 12-month high, analysts maintain a "Buy" rating with an average price target of $109.78, and the company recently reported a slight EPS beat. Institutional ownership remains high at 86.23%, with Glencore plc making a substantial new investment.

feed.title: Trend Tracker for (BTO) (BTO:CA)
feed.summary: This article provides a "Trend Tracker" report for B2Gold Corp. (BTO:CA), detailing AI-generated signals and trading plans with specific buy and short targets and stop losses. The report, updated on January 19, 2026, rates BTO:CA as Neutral for Near and Mid term and Strong for Long term. It also lists numerous past reports on BTO from Canada Stock Traders Daily.

feed.title: Should You Buy Dividend Aristocrats in 2026?
feed.summary: This article suggests a strategy for investors to receive monthly dividends by combining shares of three Dividend Aristocrat companies: Coca-Cola (KO), Caterpillar (CAT), and McDonald’s (MCD). It details how each company's dividend payout schedule can be coordinated to ensure a steady income stream throughout the year. The author highlights the reliability and consistent shareholder rewards offered by these blue-chip companies.

feed.title: Chimera Investment Corp: Mortgage REIT Battling Headwinds As Yield-Hunters Stay Cautious
feed.summary: Chimera Investment Corp (CIM) has seen its stock decline over the past year, resulting in capital losses for investors despite its high dividend yield. The mortgage REIT is facing headwinds due to interest rate uncertainty and a fragile macroeconomic environment. Analysts are cautiously neutral, suggesting a "Hold" stance as the company needs to demonstrate its ability to defend book value and maintain dividends amidst a challenging rate path.

feed.title: Telix Pharmaceuticals secures China approval for prostate cancer imaging filing
feed.summary: Telix Pharmaceuticals has received clearance from Chinese regulators to file a drug application for its lead prostate cancer imaging agent, TLX591-Px (Illuccix). This approval, submitted by partner Grand Pharmaceutical Group, is a major milestone for Telix's growth strategy and targets a significant and growing prostate cancer market in China. The filing is supported by positive data from a China Pivotal Phase 3 study.

feed.title: Is Taiwan Semiconductor a Better Buy Than Intel for 2026?
feed.summary: This article argues that Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSMC) is a superior investment compared to Intel for 2026, citing TSMC's dominant market share in semiconductor fabrication, stronger financial performance, and robust growth. The author highlights TSMC's higher revenue, profitability, dividend payments, and net cash position, contrasting these with Intel's declining revenue, lower margins, and suspended dividend. The presence of TSMC factories in the U.S. further solidifies its market position.

feed.title: Truist Raises Lowe's (LOW) Target to $295 as Card Data Supports the Setup
feed.summary: Truist has raised its price target on Lowe's (LOW) to $295 from $269, maintaining a Buy rating. The adjustment is based on Truist Card data and ICR holiday updates, with the firm also noting the potential for increased retail sales due to higher tax refunds. Lowe's dividend remains dependable with a 38% payout ratio, and recent acquisitions are expected to support long-term income growth.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Puts "Catalyst Call: Sell" on Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Ahead of Q4
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has issued a "Catalyst Call: Sell" rating on Illinois Tool Works (ITW) ahead of its Q4 earnings, suggesting potential short-term underperformance. The bank warns that a miss on earnings or weak guidance could further hurt the stock. Despite this near-term bearish outlook, ITW has a strong long-term reputation for delivering shareholder value through organic growth and customer-focused innovation.

feed.title: Synopsys Joins Ignite’s Scale-up Program for Deep Tech Innovation
feed.summary: Synopsys has partnered with Ignite Next, an independent scale-up program focusing on deep tech innovation, becoming a key technology collaborator. This collaboration aims to support European deep tech startups, particularly in semiconductors, physical AI, and advanced computing, by providing tools, infrastructure, industry expertise, and mentorship. Synopsys joins other tech leaders like Infineon and Intel in this non-dilutive, founder-first program, strengthening the deep tech ecosystem and bridging the gap between scientific breakthroughs and industrial-scale execution for startups.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial Is Quietly Rebuilding the Future of Consumer Credit
feed.summary: Synchrony Financial is transforming from a traditional store-card issuer into a comprehensive consumer finance and embedded credit platform. It achieves this by powering private-label cards, installment financing, and digital banking for retailers and healthcare providers without direct consumer branding. The company's strategy relies on deep merchant alignment, specialized vertical expertise, a hybrid bank charter/fintech model, and robust data analytics to compete against rivals like Discover, Capital One, and BNPL players like Affirm.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor stock: what to watch before Wall Street reopens Tuesday
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor (ON) stock closed up 0.1% on Friday ahead of the Martin Luther King Jr. Day holiday, with the broader chip sector showing strength. Traders are looking ahead to Tuesday's trading, considering deal whispers in semiconductors, new tariff threats from former President Trump on European nations, and the tightening grip of Washington on chip supply chains. Future events to watch include the Federal Reserve’s policy meeting and ASML’s quarterly earnings.

feed.title: DeFi Technologies Faces Investor Lawsuits and Revenue Downgrade
feed.summary: DeFi Technologies is facing significant legal challenges due to investor lawsuits alleging securities law violations and corporate misrepresentation between May and November 2025. This crisis of confidence is exacerbated by a severe downgrade in the company's 2025 revenue forecast from $218.6 million to approximately $116.6 million, which led to a more than 27% share price drop. Despite operational continuity in its Valour subsidiary, all attention is now on the legal process, with a lead plaintiff motion deadline of January 30, 2026.

feed.title: Ashland Inc. Declares $0.415 Quarterly Dividend Payable March 15, 2026
feed.summary: Ashland Inc. has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.415 per share, payable on March 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 1, 2026. This decision reflects the company's commitment to shareholder returns, impacting its 45,762,391 shares outstanding as of December 31, 2025. Wall Street analysts currently forecast a positive outlook for ASH stock over the next 12 months, with an average price target of $64.86.

feed.title: Adecoagro’s AGRO Stock: Quiet Charts, Loud Questions After A Year Of Sideways Pain
feed.summary: Adecoagro's (AGRO) stock has seen a year of largely sideways movement and has trended lower, despite broader market gains and analyst optimism for upside. The company, operating in Latin American agribusiness, is experiencing a subdued consolidation phase with thin news flow, which has resulted in a double-digit percentage loss for investors over the past year. Its future performance depends on global commodity prices, fuel policies, weather patterns, and the company's ability to demonstrate consistent financial performance and shareholder-friendly actions.

feed.title: Robbins LLP Reminds ZBIO Stockholders with Large Losses to Contac
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is reminding stockholders of Zenas BioPharma, Inc. (ZBIO) who have incurred significant losses to contact the firm regarding a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Zenas BioPharma misled investors in connection with its September 2024 IPO by overstating the duration for which existing cash and IPO proceeds could fund its operations. The company later disclosed in November 2024 that it could only fund operations for twelve months, not twenty-four, leading to a substantial drop in share price below the IPO price.

feed.title: Graphic Packaging Board Under Investigation for Breach of Fiduciary Duties
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz is investigating Graphic Packaging's board for potential breaches of fiduciary duties, stemming from shareholder dissatisfaction over the new CEO's appointment and subsequent executive departures. Several financial analysts have downgraded GPK stock, citing management changes and deteriorating market conditions, leading to revised price targets. The company, a consumer packaging provider, is facing scrutiny as its stock performance and investor confidence are impacted.

feed.title: FMC Corp Is Quietly Exploding: Is This ‘Boring’ Stock the Next Big Money Cheat Code?
feed.summary: FMC Corp, an agricultural and crop-tech company, is being highlighted as a potential rebound play despite a recent downturn. The article discusses its role in crop protection, its stock price volatility, and its dividend program, comparing it to competitors like Corteva and Bayer. It concludes that FMC is a high-risk, high-volatility speculative play for investors comfortable with thorough research and a multi-year recovery strategy.

feed.title: MetLife Sells Shopping Center For $138M: The Los Angeles Deal Sheet (January 19, 2026)
feed.summary: MetLife Investment Management sold the Chino Spectrum Towne Center to Brixmor Property Group for $138M. The article also details several personnel moves from Colliers, BrightSky Residential, and CBRE, along with other recent real estate sales in Southern California, including an office campus in Irvine for $32M and another office building in Redlands for $6.2M.

feed.title: Trend Tracker for (ASTL.WT) (ASTL.WT:CA)
feed.summary: This article provides a brief "Trend Tracker" for Algoma Steel Group Inc. Common Share Purchase Warrants (ASTL.WT:CA), issued on January 19, 2026. It includes AI-generated signal ratings of "Strong" for the Near term and "Weak" for Mid and Long terms, along with a short trading plan. The article also lists numerous recent reports related to ASTL.WT, offering a chronological overview of previous analyses.

feed.title: AutoNation Stock Tests Investor Nerves As Wall Street Weighs Used-Car Downshift
feed.summary: AutoNation's stock has declined over the past year, reflecting investor caution amid cooling used-vehicle prices and increased competition, despite the company's solid profitability and focus on higher-margin services. Wall Street analysts generally hold a "Hold" rating, questioning future earnings growth potential without extraordinary pricing cycles. The stock's future performance will depend on its ability to navigate market normalization, leverage its diversified revenue streams, and manage consumer spending and financing trends.

feed.title: (ASM) Stock Trading Blueprint (ASM:CA)
feed.summary: This article provides a trading blueprint for Avino Silver & Gold Mines Ltd. (ASM:CA), recommending a long position near 9.95 with a stop loss at 9.90. It highlights "Strong" ratings across near, mid, and long terms from AI-generated signals and lists several recent related articles.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley: Trump tariff threat poses limited broad risk to Europe stocks
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley believes that the tariff threat posed by Trump regarding Greenland presents a limited, company-specific risk to European stocks, rather than a broad-based systemic shock. Only a small percentage of MSCI Europe revenues are directly exposed to the proposed tariffs. The bank remains overweight on European defense stocks as the situation highlights Europe's commitment to strategic autonomy.
